commands.review_summary:
The PR collapses chat focus-mode topbar and content-header space, suppresses hidden-header scroll toggles while focused, expands mock dev chat history, and adds focused UI tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows focus mode still reserves topbar/header space and the scroll handler can toggle hidden-header state while focused; I did not run a browser repro, so this is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
